infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MindLog uses the microphone to record your voice during daily check-ins.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: MindLog uses speech recognition to transcribe your check-in responses.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MindLog uses the front camera to detect emotional cues during check-ins. No video is stored or transmitted.

plugins.microphonePermission: MindLog uses the microphone to record your voice during daily check-ins.

plugins.cameraPermission: MindLog uses the front camera to detect emotional cues during check-ins. No video is stored or transmitted.
